questions.question: You are given a text dataset stored in HDFS. Using CDH and HUE, create a word count report that highlights the top 10 most common words in the dataset. Describe the steps you would take to achieve this.
questions.hint: Describe the steps you would take using CDH and HUE to create the report.

questions.question: Create a bar chart of the top 5 most popular products in a sample e-commerce dataset using CDH and HUE. Describe the data processing steps you would take to achieve this.
questions.hint: Describe the data processing steps using CDH and HUE to create the bar chart.

questions.question: Using CDH and HUE, analyze a sample dataset of customer purchases and generate a report that shows the average transaction value for each region. Describe the data processing steps you would take to achieve this.
questions.hint: Describe the data processing steps using CDH and HUE to generate the report.
